project_type: Next.js 14 medical tourism website with App Router
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to confirm no compile errors. Run npm run lint to confirm linting passes.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js v22, npm available. No test suite configured beyond ESLint. Supabase DB not available locally but fallback-data.ts provides static data.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode. Tailwind CSS for styling. Framer Motion for animations. Follow existing component patterns.
key_patterns: Components in components/ directory. Home page sections in components/home/. Layout components in components/layout/. AppShell wraps Navbar + Footer + FloatingButtons for all public pages. Images use Next.js Image component with remote patterns configured in next.config.mjs (supports supabase.co, satyughealthcare.com, vaidam.com, upload.wikimedia.org, img.youtube.com). Site images managed via lib/site-images.ts with SITE_IMAGE_DEFAULTS. Custom Tailwind tokens defined in tailwind.config.ts.
directory_structure: app/(public)/page.tsx is the home page. components/home/ has all home sections. components/layout/ has AppShell, Navbar, Footer, WhatsAppButton. components/shared/ has WhatsAppFloat. next.config.mjs configures allowed image domains. lib/site-images.ts maps image keys to local /images/*.webp files.
